concerns.text: T021 validates against 'KnotInfo reference values per FR-003/SC-012' but Constitution Principle VI requires verification against 'primary mathematical literature definitions' (Birman & Menasco 1988, Seifert 1934, Schubert 1956). KnotInfo is a secondary database, not primary literature. This is semantic weakening of the constitutional requirement.

T051-T052 (measurement precision thresholds, error margins) are in Phase 7 (Polish) but Constitution Principle VII requires precision thresholds established BEFORE correlation analysis proceeds. Placing these in Polish creates risk they won't be implemented before core analysis, weakening the constitutional constraint.

T040 describes 'API unavailability with exponential backoff' (FR-010) but references US4/FR-010 instead of FR-014 (hyperbolic volume filtering). This creates ambiguity about which requirement is satisfied. T040 should be split or clarified to distinguish between retry logic (FR-010) and volume filtering (FR-014).

T021 implements SC-012 validation but does not include task for verifying algorithm implementations against primary mathematical literature definitions per Constitution Principle VI. SC-012 specifies KnotInfo coverage, but Constitution VI requires primary literature verification. This gap is a constitutional constraint weakening.

T006 implements retry_utils.py 'per FR-010' but does not explicitly include verification against Constitution Principle II (Reference-Validator Agent integration for citation verification). Constitution requires DOI reachability checks and title-token-overlap ≥0.7 verification which is not reflected in tasks.
